title: Peppermint Crisp Tart
excerpt: In every one of our childhood homes there was a Peppermint Crisp tart. Albert Maritz has a sweet tooth and asked me to make this tart for him.
html: In every one of our childhood homes there was a Peppermint Crisp tart.  Albert Maritz has a sweet tooth and asked me to make this tart for him.

items: 2 Nestlé Peppermint Crisp chocolates (150 g each), broken into pieces
2 Nestlé Aero Peppermint chocolates (85 g each)

steps: Whip the cream to soft peak stage.
Soften the caramel in a bowl by stirring it with a spoon.
Stir the caramel into the cream.
Fold in the Peppermint Crisp chocolate.
Place one packet of Tennis biscuits at the bottom of a greased dish and spread half the mixture over.
Place another layer of Tennis biscuits on top and spread the remaining mixture over.
Break the Aero into rough pieces and sprinkle on top.
Cover with cling wrap and leave in the fridge overnight.
Finish off with the mint leaves.
